name: HaloITSM Service Management API
what_it_does: HaloITSM REST API for IT service management and service desk platform. Enables AI agents to manage IT support tickets and incidents, handle change management workflows, manage IT assets and CMDB, track SLA compliance, handle service catalog requests, manage problem management, integrate ITSM data with monitoring and DevOps tools, and automate IT service delivery workflows.
use_cases: Managing IT support tickets and incident routing from service desk automation agents
Tracking SLA compliance and escalation from IT operations agents
Managing IT asset and configuration item data from CMDB management agents
Handling change request approvals from IT governance agents
not_for: MSP multi-tenant management without in-house IT service management focus
Customer support CRM without IT service management workflows
Project management without ITIL-aligned service delivery processes
best_when: An in-house IT department or enterprise IT service desk using HaloITSM wants AI agents to automate ticket triage, incident management, change request routing, and SLA monitoring workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: ITSM access includes IT asset configuration and change management capabilities. Unauthorized changes to IT infrastructure via ITSM automation can cause service outages.

auth.notes: HaloITSM uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Tenant-level credentials. Developer portal for integration access. Scopes control access to tickets, assets, and configuration data. On-premises and cloud deployments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — ITSM enterprise SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-agent monthly pricing; on-premises and cloud options
pricing.notes: UK company (Northampton). ITIL-aligned ITSM platform. Used by mid-market and enterprise IT departments. Includes PSA features for MSPs in HaloPSA product. Strong in UK and international markets.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: IT asset and change management capabilities — unauthorized changes can cause outages
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2
UK company — GDPR compliance; UK/EU data residency default
On-premises vs cloud deployments have different API configurations
HaloITSM vs HaloPSA are different products with different APIs
ITIL-aligned change management workflows require CAB approval — automate request creation, not approval bypassing
agent_readiness.security_notes: IT asset and configuration management data. ISO27001, GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. UK/EU/US data residency. ITIL change management controls must not be bypassed.

security_score_components.security_notes: IT asset and change management data. ISO27001, GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. UK/EU/US data residency.
